title: [PatPat] Pizza
description: Resource Pack for PatPat that adds pizza animation.
body:
A resource pack which replaces default hand from [PatPat mod](https://modrinth.com/plugin/patpat) to pizza

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hbJZshhN/images/376cf6792b902500ac6031d6be21f76421e84949.gif)
